Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Aunt Charity]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Aunt Charity is the niece of the Heart Sage.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Aunt Charity advised Mercy to keep a calm head and a cool heart.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Aunt Charity told Pride to rest.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Aunt Charity says Lindon has been helping with the relief effort.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Aunt Charity is a Heart Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Aunt Charity carried a demon-faced shield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Aunt Charity used a void key to retrieve a pill.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Aunt Charity is a great listener but people find her unnerving.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Aunt Charity is in recovery.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Aunt Charity had to hold Akura Malice back from blowing up a region.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Aunt Charity makes good elixirs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Aunt Charity gathered Mercy up in her arms.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
